strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) with deep expertise in the required primary stack technologies, including TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles.
Direct, hands-on experience with AI agent development, specifically building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq.
Exceptional background in software testing and quality assurance, evidenced by practicing TDD, creating custom test runners (Trial), and teaching Selenium courses.
concerns: The resume does not explicitly mention Nest.js or Vitest, which are core components of the primary tech stack.
Kotlin is required as a secondary technology for backend services, but the candidate only lists Java and DLang in this domain.
Extensive historical use of niche or custom technologies (DLang, Ember.js, custom CMS) may require a brief adaptation period to strict enterprise React/Nest.js patterns.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate who significantly exceeds the 6+ years of experience requirement. He demonstrates proven expertise in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) through his senior roles at Optilyz and RIDE Capital. Crucially, his current position at re:cinq involves building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly satisfying the niche AI development requirement. Furthermore, his deep commitment to testability—evidenced by his TDD practices, custom D-language test runners, and Selenium workshops—strongly aligns with the mandate to build reliable, well-tested solutions. While he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his profound overall architectural knowledge, Java experience, and cloud/containerization skills (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) make him a highly qualified fit for this role.
